Welcome to JoyStar's Story

Thank you for visiting.

Here you will find a curated selection of my work. These pieces are representative of the different media and styles that I work in and of my range of styles and themes.

Please Enjoy!

Leather
My leather pieces combine my love of painting with
a passion for tactile and wearable art.
Paintings
I practice watercolor, pencil, and pen and ink art as a
connection with nature and the spiritual world.
Other Projects
I love exploring a variety of materials and methods of
creating. Here are some of my more varied projects.
Booth and Set Up
Below are a few of my booth set ups. My display can
vary depending on venue and internal restrictions.
Thank You
I look forward to hearing from you soon!
